mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE role = 'assistant'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE role = 'assistant' AND feedback_helpful IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE role = 'assistant' AND feedback_helpful = #{helpful}

SELECT id, session_id, role, content, answer_mode, citations_json, sources_json, variants_json, created_at, feedback_helpful, feedback_note, feedback_at FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE role = 'assistant' AND feedback_helpful IS NOT NULL ORDER BY feedback_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, session_id, role, content, answer_mode, citations_json, sources_json, variants_json, created_at, feedback_helpful, feedback_note, feedback_at FROM rag_chat_messages
ORDER BY feedback_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, session_id, role, content, answer_mode, citations_json, sources_json, variants_json, created_at, feedback_helpful, feedback_note, feedback_at FROM rag_chat_messages
ORDER BY feedback_at DESC, id DESC
